programmes.show_description: Torn loyalties and criminal interference threaten to derail the investigation into Gail Vella's murder as well as AC-12's inquiry.
In the second episode Kathryn Thomas digs deeper into what is driving the need for GLP-1 medications and looks to the wider societal impact of their widespread use. (SL)
Nicole and Leanne battle over beliefs. Harper and Drew know they must try harder.
Kerrie catches Dana in a whirlwind of emotions, and in her vulnerable state, Dana finally opens up to her a little, sharing about her struggles with Sonny.
The Planet Express crew travels to Springfield to stop the Simpson family from destroying the future.
Joanne Cantwell presents live coverage of Real Madrid v Manchester City in the Round of 16, 1st leg. Commentary from Darragh Maloney and Ronnie Whelan. KO 8.00pm
Winston and Ben fight to save Jo's life; Teddy supports Link; Owen and Jules battle to save a young man; Lucas forms an unexpected bond with a patient.
As Public Eye climbs ever closer to News At Six's deteriorating numbers, Dale teams up with Rob, pushing the CEO to replace Lindsay.
Madonna makes a difficult call. Viv faces an impossible choice. Nicole takes the high road.
Abigail and Mali walk together on the beach, and Abigail tallies up their score on the magazine compatibility test.
The five best teams from last week tackle mini celebration cakes and a patisserie classic, the Les Misérables, before creating a grand pièce montée with two flavours of choux buns
Duncan and Liz build a revolutionary eco home in the picturesque Cotswolds. It will not only use very little energy, it'll also produce four times the energy it needs!
A Song for Europe: Dougal and Ted compete with their rivals on Rugged Island by writing a song to gain the dubious honour of representing Ireland in a Eurovision-style contest.
This week's dating line up includes Mim and Jack, Esther and Liam, Caoimhe and Will and Marcin and Cavan.
When a dubious opportunity presents itself to get out of an exam, the girls jump at the chance.
